key_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix modern architectural lines with subtle Khmer motifs (e.g., golden ratios, warm wood tones)
Content is King: Property images are the hero. Use aspect-ratio-video or square for listings
Negative Space: Use generous white space to reflect luxury
Contrast: Deep Royal Blue vs. Metallic Gold

usage_rules: Headings: Use lighter weights (light/regular) for large sizes to look elegant. Avoid bold everywhere.
Body: Use Inter with adequate line-height (leading-relaxed).
Colors: Never use pure black (#000000). Use #0F2A44 for headings, #475569 for body.

usage.backgrounds: White for content cards, Light Gray (#F5F5F5) for section backgrounds to create depth.
usage.text: Primary Blue (#0F2A44) for all major headings. Gold (#C9A227) for accents, active states, and primary CTAs.
usage.gradients: None. Use solid blocks of color or subtle textures.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C9A227] text-[#0F2A44] hover:bg-[#D4B03B] rounded-none px-8 py-6 font-medium tracking-wide uppercase text-sm transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#0F2A44] text-[#0F2A44] hover:bg-[#0F2A44] hover:text-white rounded-none px-8 py-6 font-medium tracking-wide uppercase text-sm transition-all duration-300

cards.property: group bg-white rounded-sm overflow-hidden border border-transparent hover:border-[#C9A227]/30 transition-all duration-300 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl
cards.category: relative h-[400px] overflow-hidden rounded-sm group cursor-pointer

inputs.default: rounded-none border-[#E2E8F0] focus:border-[#C9A227] focus:ring-[#C9A227] bg-white h-12

navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-gray-100 h-20 flex items-center justify-between

header.description: Sticky header with transparent to solid transition. Logo on left, Nav center, Contact/Lang right.

hero.description: Full height or 80vh. High-quality background image with dark overlay (bg-black/40). Centered text with search bar floating at bottom or center.
hero.elements: Headline (Poppins, White), Subhead (Inter, White/90), Search Bar (White bg, rounded-sm, shadow-2xl)

search_filters.description: Floating bar or dedicated section. Clean inputs with labels inside or top. Primary Action button.
search_filters.style: bg-white p-6 rounded-sm shadow-xl -mt-24 relative z-20 max-w-5xl mx-auto flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4

featured_properties.description: Grid of cards. Image takes 60% of card height. Details below.
featured_properties.card_style: Image zoom on hover. Price in Gold. Location with pin icon.

categories.description: 3 cards (Borey, Condo, Land). Full background image with gradient overlay. Text bottom-left.
categories.layout: Grid 3 columns. 'Borey' card could span 2 cols for emphasis.

gallery.description: Masonry or Bento grid of interiors and completed projects.
gallery.style: No gaps or small gaps (gap-1). Hover reveals caption.

contact.description: Two column: Left Form, Right Info/Map. Clean white form on gray background.
contact.elements: Gold Submit Button. Telegram icon prominent.

motion_and_interaction.hover_effects: Scale up images slightly (scale-105). Lift cards (-translate-y-1).

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid colors or subtle textures.
Do not use center alignment for long text blocks.
